message:
feat(membrane): add evidence_seqno to RuntimeDecision

Link RuntimeDecision to its evidence ring-buffer entry for tracing:

- Add evidence_seqno field to RuntimeDecision struct to track which
  evidence entry (if any) is associated with this decision
- Initialize to 0 when decision is created (meaning not sampled)
- Set to actual seqno when evidence is recorded under sampling
- Use mutable binding to allow updating seqno after evidence write

This enables downstream consumers to correlate decisions with their
evidence entries for debugging and audit trail reconstruction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
